name: bugfix-mcp-output-crash
summary: Real shipped bug: tool.execute.after hashes output.output unconditionally; MCP tools deliver {content} with no output key, so every MCP call fails with a crypto type error

checks.verifyCommand: cd packages/harness-opencode && bun -e 'const p=(await import("./src/index.ts")).default; const h=await p({client:{tui:{showToast:async()=>{}}},directory:process.cwd()},{}); await h["tool.execute.after"]({sessionID:"s",tool:"linear_get_issue",args:{id:"X"}},{output:undefined}); console.log("OK")'
